$schema_note: Verbatim contracts registered for plan-time spec/test wording-drift check. Each entry asserts that `phrase` appears as a literal substring within `section` of `spec_path` (relative to skill root). The meta-test at tests/unit/test_contracts_meta.py reads this file and verifies each entry; if a contract is silently changed in either spec or test, CI catches it (Item D — test ↔ spec wording drift).

contracts.phrase:

- `verify.sh` — exits 0 after implementation (green). Step 5.
- `IMPL_REPORT.md` — 7 sections filled across Steps 2–7. `status: complete` when done.
